response.justification: The candidate has genuine systems and geospatial credentials: real C/C++ experience (NI LabWindows/CVI components, a C++ wave-field-synthesis thesis), extensive low-latency high-performance work, and a deep GIS/mapping background. However, the recent low-latency work was in DLang rather than C++ or Rust, the C++ experience appears dated rather than 'modern C++,' there is no Rust, and the most recent roles are TypeScript/Node.js full-stack. GIS mapping is adjacent to but not the same as production navigation routing-tile pipelines. A screening conversation could clarify the depth and recency of C++ skills.
strengths: Hands-on C/C++ experience plus a C++ systems thesis project
Strong low-latency, high-performance and real-time data systems background
Extensive geospatial/GIS domain experience (Open Green Map, GISCollective)
concerns: No Rust and C++ experience appears dated, not clearly modern C++
Recent work is TypeScript/Node.js; performance work was in DLang, not C++/Rust
GIS mapping differs from navigation routing pipelines; distributed-systems depth unclear
